dollar_index.assessment: DXY below 100 handle signals continued USD weakness after recent declines from highs.

rate_differentials.assessment: Rate differentials likely narrowing as other central banks maintain restrictive policy while Fed appears dovish.

risk_sentiment.assessment: Elevated VIX above 25 indicates risk-off conditions but unusually high gold prices suggest USD safe haven demand is weak.

growth_differential.assessment: US GDP at 7.45% YoY shows exceptional growth outperformance but this hasn't translated to USD strength.

positioning.primary_trade: Short USD/JPY targeting 155.00 as BoJ intervention risk rises and USD weakens
positioning.hedge_trade: Long USD/CHF as safe haven hedge given elevated VIX
positioning.carry_trades: avoid due to risk-off environment and narrowing differentials

bull_case_usd: Exceptional 7.45% GDP growth and 4.3% unemployment support USD fundamentals. Risk-off VIX spike could trigger flight-to-safety flows despite current weakness.
bear_case_usd: DXY breaking below 100 signals major trend change as rate differentials narrow. Gold at $5,136 shows investors fleeing USD despite strong growth data.
brief_for_cio: USD weakness accelerating despite strong fundamentals - fade this move. Primary trade: short USD/JPY to 155 on intervention risk. Hedge with long USD/CHF on risk-off.
